title: malva sylvestris subsp. erecta
intro: Malva sylvestris subsp. erecta, also known as the upright mallow, is a subspecies of the common mallow plant, belonging to the Malvaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and soothing effects. The health benefits of Malva sylvestris subsp. erecta include reducing inflammation and pain, soothing digestive issues, and promoting wound healing. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, salves, and ointments, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
